title: Looker Studio Report
description: Represents a Looker Studio report, which is a collection of pages containing charts, tables, and other visualizations connected to one or more data sources.

name.description: The resource name of the report, serving as its unique identifier.

title.description: The display title of the report.

description.description: A text description of the report's purpose and contents.

owner.description: The email address of the report owner.

creator.description: The email address of the user who originally created the report.

createTime.description: The timestamp when the report was created.

updateTime.description: The timestamp when the report was last modified.

trashed.description: Whether the report has been moved to the trash.

pages.description: The pages contained within this report.

dataSources.description: The data sources connected to this report.

Page.description: A single page within a Looker Studio report.

pageId.description: The unique identifier for this page within the report.

name.description: The display name of the page.

hidden.description: Whether this page is hidden from viewers.

DataSourceReference.description: A reference to a data source used by the report.

alias.description: The alias identifier for the data source within the report (e.g., ds0, ds1).

dataSourceName.description: The display name of the data source.

connectorType.description: The type of connector used by this data source.
